\textbf{Ask-Papa AI --- RAG \& Document Intelligence} \hfill \textit{FastAPI, Qdrant, MongoDB, OpenAI}
\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=1.2em, itemsep=1pt, topsep=2pt]
  \item Multi-stage pipeline: PDF/HTML ingestion, format-aware parsing, semantic chunking, embedding, vector indexing
  \item Handled noisy inputs (OCR artifacts, multilingual content) via preprocessing heuristics and robust chunking
  \item Batched embedding generation with retry logic and rate-limit backoff to operate within API quotas
\end{itemize}

\vspace{2pt}

\textbf{ArbitrIA --- Legal RAG System} \hfill \textit{LlamaIndex, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Docker}
\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=1.2em, itemsep=1pt, topsep=2pt]
  \item Domain-specific RAG for Peruvian arbitration documents with document-level and chunk-level indexing
  \item Ingestion service handling variable PDF structures: multi-column layouts, embedded tables, inconsistent headers
  \item Conversational interface maintaining query context across turns, resolving ambiguous references
\end{itemize}

\textbf{NAO Emotion Detection --- Vision \& Robotics} \hfill \textit{PyTorch, Flask, OpenCV, Optuna}
\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=1.2em, itemsep=1pt, topsep=2pt]
  \item Emotion recognition for NAO robot in ASD clinical intervention; compared MobileNetV2/VGG19/custom CNN
  \item End-to-end pipeline: camera capture, HTTP, Flask API, inference, adaptive response (<120ms)
  \item 150+ Optuna trials with multi-objective search (accuracy vs. latency); 91\% detection in FabLab validation
\end{itemize}

\textbf{Danish Housing --- Data Pipeline \& Predictive Modeling} \hfill \textit{H2O, XGBoost, SHAP, LIME}
\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=1.2em, itemsep=1pt, topsep=2pt]
  \item Processing pipeline for 1.5M residential transactions (1992--2024) with missing values and temporal drift
  \item Benchmarked XGBoost + Optuna vs. H2O AutoML; SHAP/LIME interpretability to validate against market dynamics
\end{itemize}
